query:
SELECT 
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM topics) AS topic_count,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM news_articles) AS article_count,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM turning_points) AS turning_point_count,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM rss_sources) AS rss_source_count;

mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2T8Yuzty3NAouPd.b9d024491cfd --database e62Q4utoyfc8BuJjv96dsP --execute SELECT 
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM topics) AS topic_count,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM news_articles) AS article_count,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM turning_points) AS turning_point_count,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM rss_sources) AS rss_source_count;
